transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Sunrise Recovery Center, this is Todd.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, my name is Kyle. I've been struggling with alcohol and I think I need help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course. How long has this been going on?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Years. But it's been really bad lately. I don't know, I just... I don't really see the point in a lot of things anymore.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: How much are you drinking?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: A lot. Almost a bottle of vodka a day.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Every day?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Pretty much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. And are you looking to come in soon?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I guess. I'm not really sure what I'm looking for. I just feel like nothing's going to get better anyway.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. Do you have insurance?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, Summit Select. ID is BP11776709, group GRP-424152.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. Any prior treatment?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And what's your availability like? Could you come in this week?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I don't know. Maybe. I just don't have a lot of energy for anything lately.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We can schedule a time that works for you. Let me get someone from admissions to call you back about next steps.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We'll be in touch. Thanks for calling.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. Bye.

gold_labels.coaching_notes: CRITICAL MISSED URGENCY: Caller stated 'I don't really see the point in a lot of things anymore' and 'nothing's going to get better anyway' and 'don't have a lot of energy for anything' — passive suicidal ideation signals that required crisis protocol. Agent moved to insurance without pause. Urgency triage = 0 (unacceptable). This call requires immediate coaching review and should not happen again. Clinical screen also inadequate.
